title: Does sorting work?
excerpt:
I sent a problem that I was having with sorting on a board to support. The response that I got back was that the sort needs to be reset every time a item is added. 
Is this true?! What is the option of saving the sort fo…

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
I sent a problem that I was having with sorting on a board to support. The response that I got back was that the sort needs to be reset every time a item is added.

Is this true?! What is the option of saving the sort for if it doesn’t use it?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JCorrell

Sorting works on th current items. If oyu add an item you do need to sort it again. I think that is why you can save the sort option.

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml: So how do you activate a saved sort?

posts.author: mitchell.hudson (Mitchell hudson)
posts.cookedHtml:
@JCorrell

You can save a sort by using the filter feature, and then selecting ‘Save to this view’

Screen Shot 2020-07-22 at 9.27.06 am952×232 17.1 KB

It will then create a new view that you can reference at any time.
